title: Review for behavior preservation
goal: Review a proposed change for behavioral risk, missing verification, and scope expansion without making edits.

steps.text: Inspect the proposed change or supplied diff.
List findings first, ordered by severity and grounded in evidence.
Stop and request an implementation session if a fix is required.

acceptanceCriteria: Behavioral risk is separated from style preference

verification.text: Confirm findings map to the supplied diff or artifact.
